issues.description: Independent test verification failed (tests_passed: false) with non-functional output capture. The test_output_summary shows only 'I'll run that test command for you and show you the full output.' instead of actual pytest results. Duration was 7.6s but no test output was captured.
issues.requirement: All acceptance criteria requiring test verification (AC-004, AC-005, AC-006)
issues.suggestion: The orchestrator's independent test mechanism needs to be debugged. The test command was: pytest tests/integration/test_ephemeral_fixture.py tests/unit/test_fake_embed_fixture.py tests/unit/test_settings.py -v --tb=short

issues.description: Cannot verify file contents for docker-compose.yml (AC-001), initdb SQL script (AC-002), fake_embed fixture (AC-007), or lint compliance (AC-008) without tools. The independent test verification that should provide trust-but-verify assurance failed.
issues.suggestion: Independent test verification must succeed to validate these implementation claims, or files must be spot-checked by the orchestrator

issues.description: Plan audit was skipped (no implementation plan on disk). While the Player provided detailed completion promises, the structured plan audit could not run.
issues.suggestion: Ensure implementation plans are committed before implementation phase

issues.description: 11 honesty discrepancies flagged for files claimed as modified but showing no git changes. Root cause: files were created in worktree (.guardkit/worktrees/FEAT-CA81/) but also listed in files_modified. This is a reporting artifact.
issues.suggestion: Player's report writer should distinguish worktree-created files from main-repo modifications, or the honesty checker should worktree-path-aware

criteria_verification.notes: Cannot verify docker-compose.yml contents (image, port config, healthcheck params) without file read capability. File appears in worktree files_created but independent test verification failed.
Cannot verify 01_extensions.sql contains required CREATE EXTENSION statement without file read capability.
Cannot verify Docker-unavailable fast-fail behavior without running the scenario or reading fixture code. Player claims pytest.skip() implementation but no independent verification.

Test-dependent criterion. Player claims test_ephemeral_pg_starts_and_provides_dsn, test_ephemeral_pg_uses_random_port, and test_teardown_removes_container_and_volume passed, but independent test verification failed (tests_passed: false, garbage output).
Test-dependent criterion. Player claims test_pgvector_extension_available passed, but independent test verification failed.
Test-dependent criterion. Player claims test_data_isolation_between_projects passed, but independent test verification failed.

Cannot verify fake_embed fixture implementation (768-dim deterministic vectors, no fleet_memory imports, no network) without file read. Player claims unit tests passed in 0.01s but independent verification failed.
Cannot verify ruff check/format compliance without running the commands. Player claims 'All checks passed!' but no independent verification.

rationale: Independent test verification is the authoritative signal per Coach instructions. It shows tests_passed: false with non-functional output capture ('I'll run that test command for you and show you the full output.' instead of pytest results). Without independent confirmation and without tools to verify file contents, I cannot approve based solely on Player self-reports. This honors the absence-of-failure principle: lack of verifiable evidence is not evidence of success. The Player's detailed completion promises and self-reported 9 passing tests cannot be validated.
